transcript: Yeah dude, I broke up with Veena. You know, I met this hot girl Pooja in a photography workshop and we've already been on two dates. So I thought why not continue with Veena. She didn't take it easy, but what to do. I like Pooja, so I'm gonna go with Poo, wait. Please listen to me. What happened? Are you okay? You said you wanted to talk to me. Nothing. You know even I am planning to join poetry class. Po you know my friend Pooja she said she met somebody there and I really want to meet this guy apparently it's a first for him you have any problems with me joining the pottery class?
